2026-04-09T06:21:37.0489329Z You are in 'detached HEAD' state. You can look around, make experimental
2026-04-09T06:21:37.0490165Z changes and commit them, and you can discard any commits you make in this
2026-04-09T06:21:37.0491730Z state without impacting any branches by switching back to a branch.
2026-04-09T06:21:37.0492229Z 
2026-04-09T06:21:37.0492552Z If you want to create a new branch to retain commits you create, you may
2026-04-09T06:21:37.0493368Z do so (now or later) by using -c with the switch command. Example:
2026-04-09T06:21:37.0493811Z 
2026-04-09T06:21:37.0493994Z   git switch -c <new-branch-name>
2026-04-09T06:21:37.0494306Z 
2026-04-09T06:21:37.0494484Z Or undo this operation with:
2026-04-09T06:21:37.0494763Z 
2026-04-09T06:21:37.0494917Z   git switch -
2026-04-09T06:21:37.0495143Z
